component.name: Screen Shell

figmaReference.note: Layout chrome only; screen content is `children`. Bottom nav `225:12089`; FAB position from `lib/fabAnchor.ts`.

component.description: Column layout: optional non-scrolling header, flex scroll body, full-width bottom nav, fixed FAB above nav. Use for mobile-first shells where the FAB must not scroll with content.

structure.main: flex 1, minHeight 0, overflow auto; extra paddingBottom when FAB visible
structure.fab: portal-like fixed positioning via fabFixedAboveBottomNavStyle; wrapper pointer-events none, button auto
